name: medinet-wiki-dev
description: Lệnh tiện ích chạy dev cho Medinet Wiki (M2). Không có dependency — không cần npm install.

scripts.infra: docker compose -f Hub_All/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis
scripts.migrate: cd Hub_All/api && uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.backend: cd Hub_All/api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --port 8080
scripts.backend:reload: cd Hub_All/api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --port 8080 --reload --reload-exclude file_store --reload-exclude Hub_All
scripts.dev: echo Mo 2 terminal: chay "npm run backend" o terminal 1 va "npm run frontend" o terminal 2 (sau khi da "npm run infra").
